bird.name: 白琵鷺
bird.summary: 白琵鹭（學名：Platalea leucorodia），屬於鹮科琵鹭属。 生态环境 喜欢在泥泞水塘、湖泊或泥滩等生境中活动，常在水中缓慢前进，嘴往两旁甩动以寻找食物。

locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

locations.name: 自然系统第十版
locations.summary: 《自然系统》第十版（英語：10th edition of Systema Naturae）是18世纪瑞典生物学家卡尔·林奈所撰写的生物学专著，于1758年和1759年分别出版上下两卷。林奈在书中为动物定义了二名法命名法则（此前他曾在175…

locations.name: 朝鮮 (地區)
locations.summary: 朝鮮，又稱韓、高丽等，是东亚的一个地区，位于欧亚大陆东端，包含朝鲜半岛（韓半岛）、济州岛及朝鲜半岛附近的几个岛屿。東北接壤俄罗斯，北面接壤中國，通過朝鲜海峡和日本海與日本隔海相望。其位处汉字文化圈内，传统上深受汉文化影响，但也在建筑、音乐…

locations.name: 伊比利亚半岛
locations.summary: 伊比利亚半岛（西班牙語：la Península Ibérica、葡萄牙語：a Península Ibérica、加泰隆尼亞語：la Península Ibèrica、加利西亞語：a Península Ibérica、巴斯克語：Ib…

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: The Eurasian spoonbill (Platalea leucorodia), or common spoonbill, is a wading bird of the ibis and spoonbill family Threskiornithidae, native to Europe, Africa and Asia

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: The Eurasian spoonbill (Platalea leucorodia), or common spoonbill, is a wading bird of the ibis and spoonbill family Threskiornithidae, native to Europe, Africa and Asia

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: In Asia, it breeds in a broad band across the central part of the continent, from the Black Sea to the Korean Peninsula, as well as Kuwait, southern Iraq, Iran, southern Pakistan, India and Sri Lanka

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: Whereas those breeding in warmer parts of Asia, in Africa and the Iberian Peninsula are resident or only move locally, more northern breeders generally migrate south to winter in southwestern Europe, the northern half of Africa or warm parts of Asia

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: In 2011, 8 breeding pairs nested, successfully fledging 14 young, and in 2018 the colony had increased to 28 breeding pairs. Threats to the Eurasian spoonbill include habitat loss and degradation by drainage and pollution, it is especially adversely affected by the disappearance of reed swamps
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

Threats to the Eurasian spoonbill include habitat loss and degradation by drainage and pollution, it is especially adversely affected by the disappearance of reed swamps
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

relations.subject: 白琵鷺
relations.evidence: In Greece disturbance from fishing once caused the population to decline, and human exploitation of eggs and nestlings for food has threatened the species in the past. Breeding colonies are highly vulnerable to general disturbances and predators like red fox. Consequently, colonies are often restricted to islands free of ground predators; however, in some places, pairs in mainland colonies may breed successfully by nesting off the ground in trees and bushes. The research network Eurasian Spoonbill International Expert Group was formed in 1991. It made an action plan for the bird in 2008. In 2013 the group joined the Agreement on the Conservation of African-Eurasian Migratory Waterbirds
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
